title: CloudSync API v3.0 - Technical Specification
author: Engineering Team

sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: CloudSync API v3.0 provides a RESTful interface for file synchronization and collaboration. This document describes the architecture, endpoints, authentication mechanisms, and data models.

sections.heading: Authentication
sections.content: All API requests must be authenticated using OAuth 2.0 Bearer tokens. Tokens expire after 3600 seconds and must be refreshed using the refresh token endpoint.

sections.heading: Token Acquisition
sections.content: To obtain a token, POST to /auth/token with your client_id and client_secret in the request body.

sections.heading: API Endpoints
sections.content: The following endpoints are available in CloudSync API v3.0.

sections.heading: Files API
sections.content: Manage file uploads, downloads, and metadata operations.

sections.heading: Sync API
sections.content: Control synchronization state and conflict resolution between devices.

requirements: HTTPS required for all API calls
Rate limiting headers included in all responses
